title: DevOps Learning Roadmap
description: A complete, staged path from beginner to expert — DevOps foundations and culture, Linux and operating systems, networking, version control and collaboration, scripting and automation, build/package/artifact management, service mesh and API gateway, infrastructure as code, configuration management, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps and continuous deployment, release strategies and progressive delivery, observability and monitoring, logging, distributed tracing and APM, site reliability engineering, incident management and on-call, chaos engineering and resilience, DevSecOps and supply chain security, compliance and governance, cloud-native ecosystem and multi-cloud, platform engineering and internal developer platforms, FinOps, DatabaseOps and DataOps, MLOps/LLMOps/AIOps, documentation and runbooks, AI-augmented DevOps and future directions, and DevOps careers and certifications. Containers/Docker and Kubernetes are covered in their own dedicated subjects.

stages.title: DevOps Foundations
stages.summary: Culture, principles, history, lifecycle and delivery metrics.

nodes.title: DevOps Fundamentals
nodes.description: What DevOps is, culture, principles and history.

nodes.title: DevOps Lifecycle & Practices
nodes.description: Plan, code, build, test, release, deploy, operate, monitor.

nodes.title: DevOps Metrics & DORA
nodes.description: DORA, SPACE and delivery performance metrics.

nodes.title: System Administration
nodes.description: Services, systemd, cron, package management and tuning.

nodes.description: Layer 4/7 load balancing, reverse proxies and Envoy/Nginx/HAProxy.

nodes.title: TLS, SSL & PKI
nodes.description: TLS, certificates, mTLS and ACME.
